Offerings.title: Three ways to learn
Offerings.subtitle: Pick the format that fits you.
Offerings.groupDesc: Live video sessions in small groups so you speak from day one.

About.title: About the teacher
About.body: A language teacher devoted to getting students speaking with confidence from day one, with a warm, communicative method. (Draft — replace with the real bio.)

Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.a1: We start with Spanish; more languages are coming soon.
Faq.a2: Live over video (Google Meet), in small groups or one-on-one.
Faq.q3: Do I need a prior level?
Faq.a3: No. Take the free placement test and we start right where you are.
Faq.a4: Yes, with focused prep for exams such as the DELE.

Lead.title: Ready to start?
